title: 14 grape familiar true midair dive
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Meg's profile. Image 2 locks the top-row background and light. Image 3 exactly locks the single familiar. BEAT — Strict side-profile macro composed as hand → airborne character → face. Meg's open palm is low at frame left and her smiling profile is at frame right. The grape familiar is fully airborne halfway between them, horizontal and headfirst in a joyful swan dive, arms forward, feet behind. There is unmistakable empty air separating it from both her hand and mouth. One short violet peel- ribbon traces the arc from palm to its trailing cape. Focus is on the midair familiar. AVOID — creature standing on palm, creature sitting, contact with lips, giant mouth, teeth or tongue emphasis, throat view, falling human, terror, extra creature.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid. Treat each attached image only according to its declared authority. Preserve Raul and Meg as the same teenagers, and preserve the established top-of-bleachers world, dusk light, clothing, and geography. Attached ingredient sheets are exact character or object design authorities; reproduce them faithfully rather than redesigning them from prose. Keep the surreal event localized and legible inside the live-action stadium. Candy remains tactile, translucent, appetizing, and benign. No anatomy, gore, generic gummy bears, captions, borders, watermarks, or invented package copy.
